ground_truth.title: The Best Graphic Design Courses for Beginners in 2025
ground_truth.author: Sandra Boicheva
ground_truth.main_content: Ready to dip your toes into graphic design? This guide has you covered with some of the best graphic design courses for beginners to get you started in 2025. And because I like to keep things fresh, I'll be updating this list regularly when new must-try courses pop up—kind of like your favorite streaming playlist, but for design skills. You'll find full-fledged online certificates to quick, free and paid courses, and even practical tutorials that won't cost a dime. The courses cover basic theory, working with popular graphic design software, basics of typography, web design, motion design, UI design and many other topics. And stick around until the end, because I've also rounded up some of the best YouTube channels that offer free graphic design tutorials and courses as a little bonus. The guide covers courses from BaselineHQ (6 Parts Free Graphic Design Bootcamp), The Graphic Design School (Intensive Foundation Course, Web Design Course), Coursera (Graphic Design for Beginners, Fundamentals of Graphic Design, Introduction to Typography, User Interface Design), Upskillist (Graphic Design Course, UX Design Certificate Course), Udemy (Adobe Illustrator courses, Graphic Design Theory), Kadenze (The Complete Typographer, Introduction to Motion Design, Graphic Design History and Methods), Envato Tuts+ (logo design in Illustrator, social media templates in Figma, motion design principles, After Effects text animation, graphic design basics, print design), Skillshare (Figma UI UX Design Essentials, Adobe Illustrator CC training, Logo Design, Branding Masterclass, Psychology of Design), and LinkedIn Learning (Things Every Designer Should Know).
with: Ready to dip your toes into graphic design? This guide has you covered with some of the best graphic design courses for beginners to get you started in 2025.
The Graphic Design School (TGDS) has been around since 2008 and was actually the first fully online graphic design school.
Coursera connects you with courses from top universities and big-name companies like Google, IBM, and Stanford.
Upskillist is that friend who's always learning something cool and bringing you along for the ride.
Skillshare has hundreds of graphic design courses to help you start.
without: Follow us on Facebook, X Twitter, Bluesky, Pinterest, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn
Freebies | Get Inspired | Let's Design | Grow an Agency
